action.reasoning: Observation: Eval keeps timing out during ESM embedding extraction (50K sequences at ~8 it/s = 13 min). Best test score is 0.7453. Analysis: Need much faster inference. Use batch_size=32+ with FP16, and a simpler model architecture. Decision: 1) Train a clean model using only global ESM2-t30 embeddings (640-dim input), 2) Create fast predict.py with batch_size=32, 3) Submit eval immediately.
